articles.author: Colin Demarest
articles.title: America's new war machines showcased in Iran war - Axios
articles.description: Some of America's defense-tech advancements have been on full display during Operation Epic Fury.
articles.content:
Here's what's catching our eyes:
1. The U.S. military used, and may still be using, Anthropic's AI tools, despite President Trump's insistence on blackballing the company.
